title: Spot Vector
description: Ce style se définit par des contours noirs nets et uniformes associés à des remplissages de couleurs d'accompagnement plats et minimalistes. Ancré dans l'illustration moderne des startups technologiques, il présente une esthétique vectorielle numérique propre avec des accents géométriques flottants, aucune ombre et des courbes douces et continues qui privilégient la clarté et l'accessibilité.
description_en: This style is defined by crisp, uniform black outlines paired with flat, minimalist spot color fills. Rooted in modern tech startup illustration, it features a clean digital vector aesthetic with floating geometric accents, zero shading, and smooth, continuous curves that prioritize clarity and approachability.
description_fr: Ce style se définit par des contours noirs nets et uniformes associés à des remplissages de couleurs d'accompagnement plats et minimalistes. Ancré dans l'illustration moderne des startups technologiques, il présente une esthétique vectorielle numérique propre avec des accents géométriques flottants, aucune ombre et des courbes douces et continues qui privilégient la clarté et l'accessibilité.
prompt: Clean digital vector illustration, modern tech startup aesthetic, flat design line art. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. Execute the rendering with completely flat lighting, ensuring zero shading, no gradients, no highlights, and shadowless illumination across all elements. The color science relies on a stark white or negative space foundation, utilizing {{primary_color}} as the dominant flat fill for major focal points, {{accent_color}} for punchy, concentrated spot-color highlights, and {{secondary_color}} for subtle neutral geometric planes or supporting structures. Maintain extreme high contrast between the stark color fills and the linework. The linework itself must consist of crisp, uniform, medium-weight dark outlines featuring smooth, continuous curves and absolute geometric precision with zero pressure sensitivity. Materiality is perfectly smooth and digital, exhibiting absolutely no noise, grain, canvas weave, or texture. Edge transitions are hard, precise vector-cut silhouettes where color fills are perfectly bounded by the dark ink lines. Construct the spatial dynamics using floating compositions and a forced flat two-dimensional perspective, where depth is achieved strictly through overlapping opaque planes rather than true atmospheric perspective. Introduce orbiting abstract geometric accents such as tiny plus signs, floating circles, and minimalist squiggles around the primary composition to add energetic rhythm and a modern, approachable, minimalist atmosphere. digital vector, flat design, tech illustration, corporate memphis, uniform linework, spot color, minimalist, geometric accents, unshaded, crisp edges, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame
prompt_removebg: Clean digital vector illustration, modern tech startup aesthetic, flat design line art. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The entire composition is composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface, rendered against a flat {{background_color}} backdrop. Execute the rendering with completely flat lighting, ensuring zero shading, no gradients, no highlights, and shadowless illumination across all elements. The color science relies on a stark negative space foundation, utilizing {{primary_color}} as the dominant flat fill for major focal points, {{accent_color}} for punchy, concentrated spot-color highlights, and {{secondary_color}} for subtle neutral geometric planes or supporting structures, all interacting seamlessly with the {{background_color}}. Maintain extreme high contrast between the stark color fills and the linework. The linework itself must consist of crisp, uniform, medium-weight dark outlines featuring smooth, continuous curves and absolute geometric precision with zero pressure sensitivity. Materiality is perfectly smooth and digital, exhibiting absolutely no noise, grain, canvas weave, or texture. Edge transitions are hard, precise vector-cut silhouettes where color fills are perfectly bounded by the dark ink lines; these crisp edges interact directly with the {{background_color}}, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame and be cropped by the image boundaries. Construct the spatial dynamics using floating compositions and a forced flat two-dimensional perspective, where depth is achieved strictly through overlapping opaque planes rather than true atmospheric perspective. Introduce orbiting abstract geometric accents such as tiny plus signs, floating circles, and minimalist squiggles around the primary composition to add energetic rhythm and a modern, approachable, minimalist atmosphere. digital vector, flat design, tech illustration, corporate memphis, uniform linework, spot color, minimalist, geometric accents, unshaded, crisp edges, solid background compositing
background_prompt: A purely abstract digital vector environment featuring floating geometric planes and soft curved shapes in a modern tech startup aesthetic. The space is constructed using uniform dark outlines and flat, unshaded fills, utilizing {{primary_color}} for large sweeping background panels, {{accent_color}} for small floating accent shapes like plus signs and circles, and {{secondary_color}} for subtle overlapping structural layers. Completely flat lighting with zero texture, noise, or gradients, creating a clean, minimalist, and energetic spatial dynamic.
background_prompt_removebg: A purely abstract digital vector environment featuring floating geometric planes and soft curved shapes in a modern tech startup aesthetic. The space is constructed using uniform dark outlines and flat, unshaded fills, utilizing {{primary_color}} for large sweeping background panels, {{accent_color}} for small floating accent shapes like plus signs and circles, and {{secondary_color}} for subtle overlapping structural layers. Completely flat lighting with zero texture, noise, or gradients, creating a clean, minimalist, and energetic spatial dynamic. In the foreground, a decorative floating vector wireframe border consisting of abstract geometric nodes and intersecting curved lines frames the invisible subject, creating forced depth. The entire scene and foreground elements transition cleanly into a flat {{background_color}} surface, with crisp vector edges resting sharply against the uniform backdrop.
